query: SELECT n.id, n.userId, u.name, u.role, n.tipo, n.titulo, n.lida, n.createdAt FROM notifications n JOIN users u ON n.userId = u.id WHERE u.role IN ('gestor', 'admin', 'superintendente') ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT n.id, n.userId, u.name, u.role, n.tipo, n.titulo, n.lida, n.createdAt FROM notifications n JOIN users u ON n.userId = u.id WHERE u.role IN ('gestor', 'admin', 'superintendente') ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 30;
